title: they're really serious
content:
!/gallery/misc/battle.jpg!


the owner of this place really believes that the yellow things (whatever it's called) will drive away the evilness and help improve the business. notice the big sign on the right, this place used to be a north-eastern restaurant -- went "offline" in about 3 months. wondering how long this new one will stay "online".

oh .. all those yellow things are facing directly at  **my place** . (the restaurant is right in front of my house, separated by a public parking space.) i guess my evilness is quite well-known. :P

 %(me)seriously, i think it has something to do with the feng-shui stuff (again). any of my dear readers know what is/are the exact purpose(s) of those yellow things? do i need to find (or fire) counter measures? ehehehe ...

and by the way, i don't think it's the location -- it's the food. tried once and it tastes terrible. her~%
